question: My order tracking has not updated for four days. What should I do?
suggested_answer: When an order is delayed, verify the tracking number and the latest carrier scan. If no tracking update appears for more than 72 hours, open a carrier investigation and provide the customer with a case reference.

evidence.title: Delayed order investigation process
evidence.text: When an order is delayed, verify the tracking number and the latest carrier scan. If no tracking update appears for more than 72 hours, open a carrier investigation and provide the customer with a case reference.

evidence.title: Order delivery is delayed
evidence.text: Customer issue: The tracking information has not changed for four days and my order has not arrived. Recommended response: We will verify the carrier tracking information and open an investigation because there has been no update for more than 72 hours.
